title: Culpitt ECO Cake Board | 12" - 5 Pack | Cake Drum, Silver Fern, 12 Inch (304mm) Round, 0.5 Inch (12mm) Thick, (Pack of 5 Boards)
features: SUSTAINABLE INNER: Made from the fibrous by-product of cane sugar production the inner board comes from a naturally renewable resource. These ECO boards are a great choice to support sustainability whether you're baking at home or in the cake industry. Each cake board is covered with a fern textured silver foil.

STRONG: Sometimes referred to as a Cake Drum, this is the strongest type of Cake Board. Approx. 12mm thick, the strong Culpitt Eco Drum is fully covered with silver foil that has a neat turned edge for a professional finish.

5 PACK: This pack contains 5 x 12 inch round cake boards/drums with an attractive foil finish. Due to its thickness, if preferred the cake board may be covered in sugar paste fondant depending on your cake design, or applying a pretty ribbon around the edge of the board is a popular method of decorating your cake drum.

SUITABLE FOR ALL OCCASSIONS: A Silver cake board is great for birthdays, anniversaries, Christmas, parties, weddings and all celebrations; A multipack of 5 cake boards is an ideal choice for regular cake makers, bakers, and decorators.
SIZE: The finished Cake Board is 0.5 Inch (12mm) thick, with a Silver, 12 Inch (304mm) round top
description: From the manufacturer Culpitt Eco Cake Boards - 5 Pack Made with an incredible natural material, a fibrous by-product of cane sugar production, these boards are a great choice to support sustainability whether you're baking at home or in the cake industry. These ECO boards are just as strong as other cake drums in the Culpitt range. Cake Drums are the strongest type of Cake Board available. The strong Culpitt Eco Drum is fully covered with silver foil that has a neat turned edge for a professional finish. SUSTAINABLE INNER STRONG SUITABLE FOR ALL OCCASSIONS AVAILABLE IN 10" AND 12" SIZES PROFESSIONAL FINISH 10" and 12" Sizes Available in our most popular 10" and 12" sizes these cake boards fit inside all Culpitt cake boxes, simply match the sizes to ensure compatibility. 5 Pack Supplied as a pack of 5 boards, ideal for regular cake makers, bakers, and special events. Cake Drum Cake Boards, also known as a Cake Drum, are perfect for all types of cakes and desserts including fruit cakes, Christmas cakes, birthday cakes, and roulades. Strong A great choice for all types of cakes from sponges to dense fruit cakes this Cake Drum is the strongest type of Cake Board and is the best cake card to support heavier cakes and multi-tier bakes. Culpitt Perfect Finish Ready to Roll Icing Culpitt Board and Box Combo, Square Culpitt Cake Boards, 5 Pack Culpitt Individually Wrapped Cake Boards, 5 Pack Culpitt Board and Box Combo, Rectangular Colour Splash Gel, Concentrated Food Colouring Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.3 out of 5 stars 56 4.6 out of 5 stars 1,685 4.6 out of 5 stars 536 4.8 out of 5 stars 908 4.7 out of 5 stars 2,595 4.6 out of 5 stars 255 Price — no data £5.79 £ 5 . 79 £9.70 £ 9 . 70 £11.99 £ 11 . 99 £5.19 £ 5 . 19 £10.35 £ 10 . 35 Description Decorating your special occasion cakes doesn’t get any easier! This Ready to Roll Icing lets you cover cakes with fondant icing easily or use with cutters, texture mats and moulds to make beautiful decorations. This white box and silver square cake board set is the perfect way to efficiently and safely transport your special homemade cakes for birthdays, celebrations and parties. A Silver cake board is great for birthdays, anniversaries, christmas, parties, weddings and all celebrations; A multipack of 5 cake boards is an ideal choice for regular cake makers, bakers, and decorators. Pack of 5 individually wrapped drum boards are ideal for presenting your cakes upon. Measuring 13mm in thickness, they are strong enough to support any type of cake, from a heavy fruit cake to a lighter sponge cake. This oblong white box and silver cake board set is the perfect way to efficiently and safely transport your special homemade cakes for birthdays, celebrations and parties. Turn plain cakes into bright, eye-catching creations with Colour Splash Food Colouring Gels. Wide range of superb food colours including blue and pink food colouring. Just a small amount produces instant colour.
